chunks.heading: Document
chunks.notes: Created the main chapter page for MIT 8.01SC Chapter 2 on Units, Dimensional Analysis, and Estimation. Key claims covered include the seven SI base units, their definitions in terms of fundamental constants, and the concepts of dimensional analysis and Fermi problems. No additional entity or concept pages were created beyond the main chapter summary, as the chunk focused on foundational definitions and principles rather than in-depth treatment of specific entities or concepts.

chunks.heading: Document
chunks.notes: Written the main chapter page 'mit8-01scs22-chapter2-document' summarizing the content of pages 14-29 from MIT 8.01SC Physics Chapter 2. Key claims covered include the definition of the mole in terms of Avogadro's number, the small angle approximation in radians, the definition of steradian, the candela as an SI base unit, and dimensional analysis of force and kinetic energy. No additional pages were created as the ingest route plan only authorized the main chapter summary page.

chunks.heading: Document
chunks.notes: Created the source summary page for MIT 8.01SCS22 Chapter 2, covering estimation techniques and dimensional analysis. Key claims included the estimation of pennies for 1 km, mass of Earth's water, probability of breath molecules from Lao-Tzu, atmospheric volume estimation, and conversion of breath volume to molecules using Avogadro's constant. No additional entity or concept pages were created in this chunk.
